elements.text: Even though you normally can manage the workload in your classes, you recently had a rough week at school. Specifically, you made a couple of mistakes on an important project. When you think about the semester, you think it is likely that your grade in the class will turn out...

elements.name: mistakes_while_working--academics_work_career_development--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
